original: Your stomach turns suddenly, sending you into a panic of nausea. You lean over, feeling as if you could vomit, but hold it in. That was abrupt.
Your occasional nausea returns, this time stronger. It can’t be something you ate... it’s been too persistent. You check your Codex for a reading and confirm your suspicion: pregnant.
The nausea that’s been plaguing you is persistent every morning now, like a background hum. Your [pc.belly] is even more rounded.
Your pregnancy has progressed to the point that people who bother to look are starting to notice - your waistband is expanding further every day.

Your [pc.belly] is starting to become cumbersome, pushing the straps of your gear out of place. It’s a bit early for it to be this far progressed... your baby is probably not a human child. You examine your Codex for another scan: it’s a hybrid of human and korgonne, the dog-like natives of Uveto VII.
Your [pc.breasts] are also beginning to swell and dribble milk, preparing to nurse the new lives. You are lactating!

It’s hard to move quickly with how swollen you are; your [pc.belly] seems to get in the way of everything. Still, you can get by with a bit of extra effort, and the accelerated pace of this baby suggests that you won’t have to endure much longer.
